title: Assign a Project Manager to a project
excerpt:
Hi, 
When we create a single project or a project in general is there a general field somewhere where we can assign the Project Manager of this project? 
Thanking you in advance.

posts.author: spyros.savvides (Spyros Savvides)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

When we create a single project or a project in general is there a general field somewhere where we can assign the Project Manager of this project?

Thanking you in advance.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @spyros.savvides!

When assigning to a project, are you referring to assigning a manager to an entire board? If you’re managing projects through items in your board, you could simply use the People Column, however in terms of assigning someone to an entire board, I’d recommend making that specific person the board owner so they have ownership and control over all activity within the board - I’d say this is the best way to assign management of the project. You can then also customise the board settings to ensure they receive all relevant notifications and updates
